creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
The problem is that you enabled profiling (via the PROFILE flag) for the port, while it was not probably enabled for all the dependencies when they have been built.  Note that this what the error message also tells:

    Perhaps you haven't installed the profiling libraries for package ‘scientific-0.3.3.8@scien_5NQHiMKEgH2DOLHdLSFbA2’?
